name: Mocha Moons
recipeInstructions:
1. Put chopped cashew nuts in a pie plate.
2. Cut the cylinder container away from the first pint of ice cream and roll it in the chopped nuts, pressing the nuts into the sides.
3. Repeat with the second pint of ice cream, rolling each one in chopped nuts as well.
4. Wrap each pint in plastic wrap and chill for 1 hour.
5. To serve, cut each roll lengthwise, then divide each half into 4 moon-shaped slices.
6. Serve two moons topped with Mocha Sauce.
7. Makes 4 servings.
Source: Corby Kummer, "The Joy of Coffee"
